subject: UPDATED: Tango classifier v2 - ready to use
body:
Booker,

Classifier updated and tested. Use this to filter FB matches.

## LOCATION

```
harvester/lib/tango-classifier.ts
```

## USAGE

```typescript
import { classifyTango } from '../../harvester/lib/tango-classifier.ts';

// When you fetch FB event, run it through classifier
const result = classifyTango(fbEventTitle, fbEventDescription);

if (result.isTango) {
  // ACCEPT - use this FB match for enrichment
  console.log(`Match: ${result.confidence * 100}% - ${result.reason}`);
} else {
  // REJECT - skip this FB event, not tango
  console.log(`Skip: ${result.reason}`);
}
```

## LOGIC

**Level 1 (instant accept):** tango, milonga, practica, encuentro
**Level 2 (accept):** vals, chacarera, bandoneon, ocho, gancho, rulo, baldosa, volcada, colgada, etc.
**Neutral (need L1/L2):** festival, workshop, class, dance
**Red flags (reject unless L1):** concert, jazz, rock

## TEST RESULTS

```
✓ TANGO 90%: "Bay Area Tango Encuentro"
✓ TANGO 90%: "Portland Tango Festival" (L1 overrides neutral)
✗ NOT   20%: "Oakland Music Festival" (neutral only)
✓ TANGO 91%: "Tango Concert" (L1 overrides red flag)
✗ NOT   20%: "Dance Class" (neutral only)
✓ TANGO 75%: "Vals Night" (Level 2)
✓ TANGO 90%: "Queer Milonga" (L1 overrides queer festival)
✗ NOT    0%: "Jazz in the Park" (red flag, no L1)
✗ NOT    0%: "Birthday Party" (nothing)
```

## IMPORTANT

Over-matching to wrong TANGO event = OK (we fix later)
Matching to NON-TANGO event = BAD (pollutes calendar)

Use classifier on every FB event before accepting the match.

— Harvey
